operating_ranges.evidence: Normal surface temperature of the pump-body at ultimate vacuum (operation) ambient temperature of 20°C: 45 to 65°C
Maximum permitted outlet pressure (at full pump throughput): 0.5 bar gauge 1.5 bar absolute 1.5 x 10⁵ Pa
Ultimate vacuum without gas-ballast (partial pressure): ranges from 2.5 x 10⁻⁴ mbar to 3 x 10⁻² mbar depending on model
Motor rotational speed: 50 Hz electrical supply: 1450
Motor rotational speed: 60 Hz electrical supply: 1750

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: The oil in the pump should be clear; if the oil is cloudy or discoloured, it is contaminated with process vapours

degradation_mechanisms.driven_by: corrosive or abrasive gases and vapours
degradation_mechanisms.evidence: More frequent maintenance required for pumps processing corrosive or abrasive gases and vapours - Recommendation: Replace pump seals every year under corrosive/abrasive conditions
If the motor fan-cover is not kept clean, the air-flow over the motor can be restricted and the pump may overheat

fault_conditions.name: motor_overheating
fault_conditions.description: Motor overheats due to restricted air-flow
fault_conditions.evidence: If the motor fan-cover is not kept clean, the air-flow over the motor can be restricted and the pump may overheat

fault_conditions.name: oil_contamination
fault_conditions.description: Oil becomes cloudy or discoloured from process vapours
fault_conditions.symptoms: cloudy or discoloured oil visible in sight-glass
fault_conditions.evidence: The oil in the pump should be clear; if the oil is cloudy or discoloured, it is contaminated with process vapours

fault_conditions.name: motor_electrical_failure
fault_conditions.symptoms: earth continuity greater than 0.1 Ω or insulation resistance less than 10 MΩ
fault_conditions.evidence: Earth continuity: less than 0.1 Ω, Insulation resistance: greater than 10 MΩ - If the motor fails these tests, you must replace the motor

maintenance_actions.name: check_oil_level
maintenance_actions.evidence: Check the oil-level: As required, at least monthly

maintenance_actions.name: clean_and_overhaul_pump
maintenance_actions.evidence: Clean and overhaul the pump: 15000 operation hours

maintenance_actions.name: decontaminate_oil
maintenance_actions.evidence: Operate the pump until the oil is clear when oil is cloudy or discoloured

assumptions.statement: Gas-ballast operation is used when pumping condensable vapours
assumptions.reason: Manual specifies to use gas-ballast when there is high proportion of condensable vapours

assumptions.statement: Oil sight-glass provides accurate indication of oil level and condition
assumptions.reason: Maintenance procedures rely on visual inspection of oil through sight-glass
